name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Got a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
As one of the President’s top supporters... |
---
| | | | | | |

Peter,

We don't trust the fake news polls about President Trump so we're coming to our top supporters to know:

**Do you approve of President Trump 's job performance?** [YES](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=27ca459b150a45456eb610874d339976d13057e1ee6c55f79ed23cefe7bcb4b835178bfeeb599d92bdb2f2a3dfcddc48) [NO](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=27ca459b150a4545566de6fd474e82ff3082eff19bfc965f13c329dbd10ffcd99a1afed3a1e30b553ac8a37371ad4f87)
The President appreciates your input.

_**[Please take our Official Presidential Approval Poll to indicate whether you approve of the job President Trump is doing to Make America Great Again!](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=27ca459b150a4545ad740415adae6885800794c4e658700381946672289a4c741e00bca5ffcfdd8e0d12abb97725bce4)**_

Thank you,

Presidential Polling
Team Trump

[TAKE THE POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=27ca459b150a454519d01b34e8c37c935f40f5ff739f28a0befb21a04aeb3a9c7d836442689a2494b79dff9706f92474)
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=27ca459b150a4545ab0ae5a31584843f5d61b3686f681299a089273a4a26573324a5dcf397ca03a27edbad941c9f170d) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=27ca459b150a4545e8edf2e52cffcca86b69848e987ed5305033ce1e17f7ec2b383739694cbc61a9dba8c6757c5171fd) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22abfbc5fbe8e33ea861798c241414fe5a392a18a54339335b05a1ba23d2c86a21e2095895339c4dc779) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d4846d0bed066d76509ec090ff2d445930e381e9464d7b8904770)

name: Peter Hanscom
subject: We're in for another fight (health care)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
President Trump has doubled down on his efforts to dismantle the ACA. |
---

| | Peter,

In the past 48 hours, President Trump has doubled down on his efforts to dismantle the ACA. First, he issued an executive order that attempts to destroy the insurance marketplaces. And late last night, the Trump/Pence Administration announced it would stop making crucial payments that keep insurance costs down for low-income Hoosiers.

**This is serious, Peter.** Now, low-income and rural families are in even more danger of being priced out of their health plans. Premiums could rise by _as much as 20 percent_ a year going forward.

President Trump and his administration are on a partisan crusade to sabotage the ACA and cut off access to affordable care purely for political gain -- no matter who it hurts. **We're in for another fight, and Joe's going to need us to have his back.**

**Will you pitch in now to make sure Joe can stay in the Senate and do everything in his power to protect Hoosiers ' health care?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
******[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24e1/7377f838/3493251b/51fb8c30/2120326409/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octaca?express_lane=true&refcode=20171013nd&amount=10")******
******[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24e1/7377f838/3493251b/51fb8c33/2120326409/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octaca?express_lane=true&refcode=20171013nd&amount=25")******
******[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24e1/7377f838/3493251b/51fb8c32/2120326409/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octaca?express_lane=true&refcode=20171013nd&amount=50")******
******[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24e1/7377f838/3493251b/51fb8c2d/2120326409/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octaca?express_lane=true&refcode=20171013nd&amount=100")******
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24e1/7377f838/3493251b/51fb8c2c/2120326409/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octaca?refcode=20171013nd")****
Thanks,
Peter

****[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24e1/7377f838/3493251b/51fb8c2f/2120326409/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octaca?refcode=20171013nd&amount=25")****
---

|

---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206

name: DNC War Room
subject: A bill was passed last week, Derek. You should know about it:
body:
Women deserve better than Donald Trump and the GOP. **Republicans want to turn back the clock on women's rights. Add your name if you're committed to stopping them.

name: just-launched@dscc.org
subject: This sticker fights Trump's Obamacare sabotage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The GOP still won't let up on their attempts to destroy Obamacare, so it's more important than ever that we show off our commitment to defending Obamacare.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/long-live-obamacare-sticker?refcode=DPE-20171014-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

The GOP still won't let up on their attempts to destroy Obamacare. After failing to pass a repeal bill in the Senate twice, Trump is deliberately sabotaging Obamacare through executive actions.

In the face of these outrageous attacks, it's more important than ever that we show off our commitment to defending Obamacare.

[**Chip in now to help Senate Democrats protect Obamacare -- and when you give $5 or more, we 'll send you this "Long live Obamacare" sticker! GET YOURS >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/long-live-obamacare-sticker?refcode=DPE-20171014-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/long-live-obamacare-sticker?refcode=DPE-20171014-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Grassroots Democrats like you saved Obamacare by making your voices heard -- and now Senate Democrats need you to stay engaged to fight Trump's sabotage and keep protecting access to affordable care.

There's no better way to express your continued commitment than with a sticker that supports Senate Democrats and helps them keep fighting to save Obamacare.

[**Chip in $5 or more to support Senate Democrats and get your limited-edition "Long live Obamacare" sticker before they run out >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/long-live-obamacare-sticker?refcode=DPE-20171014-JustLaunched_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dea4/2b07114c/e2b8953a/73156708/689775588/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dea4/2b07114c/e2b8953a/7315670b/689775588/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dea4/2b07114c/e2b8953a/7315670a/689775588/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: DNC War Room
subject: You're the last line of defense between Trump and the environment, Derek
body:
We have to resist the GOP's attacks on our environment. **The Trump administration has become an actual biohazard. Add your name if you're committed to electing Democrats who will protect our planet.

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523b90/4067b0a/446db4b48/7e65edd3/3838399011/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171014_dnc3_nd&source=em_20171014_dnc3_nd"). name: Team DWS
subject: just wanted to check in
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends, We need resources immediately if we're going to keep Debbie ahead of her opponents and effectively respond to attacks by national Republicans. Right now, we have not reached our fundraising goals and need to pick up the pace, ASAP. To be prepared in 2018, we need 31 supporters to step up and give today. [_**Chip in $5 >>**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e11/622b7b5b/68ca4eb/307bd1e1/3484102535/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171015?refcode=dwse171015_m&recurring=true&amount=5") This is what we have on record for you: **SUPPORTER:** Friend
**LOCATION:** 34223
**STATUS:** Given today to keep Debbie ahead: **NO**
**SUGGESTED AMOUNT:** $5
[ _**Click here to give today >>**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e11/622b7b5b/68ca4eb/307bd1e1/3484102535/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171015?refcode=dwse171015_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Debbie's campaign is powered by supporters like you. Door by door, Debbie is building a grassroots network to push back against the right-wing agenda being pushed by President Trump and Republicans in Congress. Now that President Trump is actively sabotaging our health care system, it is even more important to have a fighter like Debbie in Congress to keep him in check. Small-dollar gift by small-dollar gift, your support provides Debbie and her team with the tools they need to protect our progress and fight back. [_**If you can, give $5 or more and help power Debbie 's grassroots network.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e11/622b7b5b/68ca4eb/307bd1e1/3484102535/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171015?refcode=dwse171015_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you, Team DWS |

name: Team Ryan
subject: Why China is beating us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

What's a major difference between the U.S. and China?

A 10 percent difference in tax rates.

This is what allowed China to become the economic giant it is today. But China isn't the only country with a more competitive tax rate. Take a look:

**Honestly, it 's no wonder we've been left in the dust while other nations continue to prosper. **

Fed up? So are we. That's why our conservative tax plan will fix our tax rate to make America competitive in the world economy.

**[Show your support for renewed American prosperity now>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MzEwMjcwNzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MTgyNzMxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you,

Team Ryan

| [Take a stand >> ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzEwMjcwNzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MTgyNzMxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
